sources.title: Luis Trenker Der Rebell ( 1933) [ Drama] Ganzer Film (deutsch)
sources.description: Film aus dem deutschen dritten Reich von 1933 Der Rebell (Luis Trenker)

metadata.Plot: A young medical student returns to his Tyrolean home to find out that Napoleon's troops have taken over the area and that his mother and sister have been murdered.
metadata.Director: Curtis Bernhardt, Edwin H. Knopf, Luis Trenker
metadata.Writer: Henry Koster, Walter Schmidtkunz, Robert A. Stemmle
metadata.Actors: Luis Trenker, Luise Ullrich, Victor Varconi
